title: [FIRRTL] Add "_ext" suffix to Memory module and instance name
body:
Update the memory module name and instance names with an "_ext" suffix to match SFC behavior. 
This commit adds a utility to Namespace, to generate a unique new name with a given suffix.
This utility is used to generate the memory module name with "_ext" suffix.
This commit also updates the `LowerToHW` to add the "_ext" suffix to the instance name.
